# Pull Request

## Description
Brief description of what this PR does.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New tool (new MCP tool functionality)
- [ ] Tool improvement (enhancement to existing tool)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring / Code quality improvement

## Changes Made
- 
- 
- 

## Testing
- [ ] Type checking passes (`npm run typecheck`)
- [ ] Build succeeds (`npm run build`)
- [ ] Tested against real Azure DevOps instance
- [ ] Tested with MCP client (OpenClaw / Claude Desktop)

## New/Modified Tools
If adding or modifying tools, list them:
- `tool_name` - what it does

## Agent Impact
How does this change affect AI agent usage of the MCP? (better context, new workflows, token efficiency, etc.)

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] Tool follows existing pattern (Zod schema, ToolResponse, suggestedActions)
- [ ] I have updated STATUS.md if adding new tools
- [ ] I have updated README.md if changing functionality
- [ ] I have updated CHANGELOG.md
- [ ] My changes generate no new TypeScript errors

## Related Issues
Closes #(issue number)
